summary: Frontend E2E testing of H4 Company landing page. Tested all 17 requested features across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports using Playwright + window.open interception. All critical flows pass: hero, navbar scroll behavior, social proof, problem/solution, services (4 cards w/ Auxílio Acidente DESTAQUE), differentials (4 cards), mid CTA scroll, lead form validation (3 errors on empty submit), phone mask formatter, valid form submit opens wa.me/5511994042707 + success screen, contact section, footer, WhatsApp float scroll-gated visibility, mobile responsive (hamburger menu, hero/services stack to 1 col).
critical_code_review_comments: LeadForm.jsx (~327 lines) and other components use heavy inline-style objects instead of Tailwind/CSS classes; acceptable for a one-page marketing site but reduces reusability.
WhatsAppFloat: initial useEffect runs onScroll() once on mount which is correct; consider also adding {passive:true} to scroll listener for perf.
No backend wiring as expected (static landing page). All form data is sent via wa.me query string only — confirm GDPR/LGPD note (already present in disclaimer).
Phone mask in LeadForm.jsx works for 10 and 11 digit numbers; OK.
Hero image is loaded from images.unsplash.com — verify licensing/usage. Image is relevant (consultoria team workspace).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing page, no backend. Form submission triggers window.open(wa.me/5511994042707) — to test, intercept window.open via page.evaluate before clicking submit. data-testids are well-defined per components/*.jsx. WhatsApp float visibility is scroll-gated (>320px); test on fresh page load to avoid state pollution from previous interactions. Mobile breakpoints: <900px hides desktop nav; <600px collapses services grid to 1 column.
passed_test_evidence: Hero headline 'Decisões melhores. Resultados extraordinários.' rendered
Navbar bg transparent at top (rgba(0,0,0,0)), changes to rgba(6,13,26,0.85) after scroll
Social proof shows 4.6/5, 71 avaliações, 3 testimonial cards
Services: 4 cards rendered, 'Auxílio Acidente' + 'DESTAQUE' badge present
Empty form submit shows error-name, error-phone, error-message
Valid form submit calls window.open with URL containing 'wa.me/5511994042707' and shows form-success
Contact section: phone (99404-2707), address, email cards, whatsapp CTA
WhatsApp float: display:none at scrollY=0, display:flex at scrollY>320, href contains wa.me/5511994042707
Mobile 390px: desktop-nav hidden, hamburger visible, mobile menu opens, hero grid 342px (1 col), services grid 342px (1 col)
